innateAbility.name: Puckish
innateAbility.description: Restores a portion of both its max health and max mana per incoming attack projectile disjointed.The restoration is more effective when disjointing incoming spell-based projectiles.

abilities.name: Illusory Orb
abilities.description: Sends out an orb correspondingly to the vector-targeted direction, with the point-targeted location being the the orb's curved point, damaging enemy units along the way.The orb additionally deals a portion of the spell damage as damage over time within the radius.At any point, Puck may teleport to the current location of the orb using Ethereal Jaunt.

abilities.name: Ethereal Jaunt
abilities.description: Teleports to a flying Illusory Orb

abilities.name: Waning Rift
abilities.description: Teleports to the area-targeted location, deals damage, and silences enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Phase Shift
abilities.description: Puck briefly shifts and hides into another dimension where it is immune from harm.

abilities.name: Dream Coil
abilities.description: Creates a coil of volatile magic that latches, damages, and leashes onto enemy heroes.
